name: cleancentive
description: Litter cleanup tracking platform with automated image analysis

scripts.dev: bun run dev:infra:start && (bun run dev:infra:provision &) && bun run --filter '*' dev
scripts.dev:infra:start: bun run infrastructure/check-hosts.ts && bun run infrastructure/setup-certs.ts && docker compose -f infrastructure/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.dev:infra:provision: bun run infrastructure/setup-umami.ts && bun run infrastructure/setup-outline.ts
scripts.install:all: bun install && bun install --cwd backend && bun install --cwd frontend && bun install --cwd worker
scripts.browse: bun run dev:infra:start && (bun run dev:infra:provision &) && bun run --filter '@cleancentive/frontend' browse &
